name: Beauty Riddle
short_description: "Beauty Riddle" is a fun click puzzle game, each game level contains a number of word riddles, the answer to each riddle is hidden in the image of the beautiful girl, come and see how many riddles you can solve!
detailed_description:
"Beauty Riddle" is designed to give you a relaxed, fun, slightly challenging game experience, each level of the game contains several text riddles, the answer to the riddle hidden in the image of beauty girl, with the mouse click on the correct location to solve the corresponding riddle.

You don't have to worry about being unable to solve a riddle for a long time, if you stay on a riddle for more than 1 minute, the game will pop up an "Auto Search" button. Of course, you can also continue to challenge your eyesight without relying on this button ^_^

Game Features:

  • 360 non-repeating word riddles
  • 80 lovely images of beautiful girls
  • 30 heart-stirring songs or pieces
